title: Labour Economics - Bank of Canada
content:
## Subscribe to Labour Economics Labour Economics
- Nishaad Rao Nishaad Rao is a macroeconomist specializing in housing, urban and regional economics, and inequality. Department(s) : Financial Stability Research Field(s) : Household Finance , Housing , Inequality , Labour Economics , Macroeconomics , Quantitative Macroeconomics , Urban and Regional Economics
- Ramisha Asghar Department(s) : Canadian Economic Analysis , Survey and Economic Intelligence Research Field(s) : Business Surveys , International Trade and Finance , Labour Economics
- Michael Irwin Michael Irwin is a Senior Economist in the Financial Stability Department at the Bank of Canada. Department(s) : Financial Stability , Model Development and Research Research Field(s) : Business Cycles , Household Finance , Labour Economics , Macroeconomics , Quantitative Macroeconomics
- Felipe Alves Department(s) : Canadian Economic Analysis Research Field(s) : Labour Economics , Macroeconomics , Monetary and Fiscal Policy
- Gaelan MacKenzie Gaelan MacKenzie is a Senior Economist. Department(s) : International Economic Analysis , International Studies Division Research Field(s) : Applied Microeconomics , Firm Dynamics , Growth and Development , Industrial Organization , Inequality , International Trade and Finance , Labour Economics , Macroeconomics , Productivity , Technological Change
- Gabriela Galassi Gabriela Galassi is a Senior Economist in the Labour and Inflation Team of the Canadian Economic Analysis Department at the Bank of Canada. Department(s) : Canadian Economic Analysis , Labour and Inflation Research Field(s) : Applied Econometrics , Data Science , Digital Economy , Labour Economics
- Youngmin Park Youngmin Park is a Principal Researcher in the Canadian Economic Analysis (CEA) department. Department(s) : Canadian Economic Analysis , Canadian Economic Studies Research Field(s) : Labour Economics , Macroeconomics , Public Finance
- Dany Brouillette Department(s) : Canadian Economic Analysis , Canadian Economic Studies Research Field(s) : Applied Econometrics , Labour Economics , Technological Change Alma Mater : Université de Laval
- Daniela Hauser Daniela Hauser is the Senior Research Advisor in the Strategic Leadership Group of the International Economic Analysis Department. Department(s) : International Economic Analysis , Strategic Leadership Group Research Field(s) : International Macroeconomics , Labour Economics , Monetary and Fiscal Policy Alma Mater : Universitàt Autonòma de Barcelona
- Sarah Miller Sarah Miller was appointed as the Regional Director (Economics) at the Bank of Canada’s Regional Office for the Atlantic Provinces in August 2023. Department(s) : Canadian Economic Analysis , Survey and Economic Intelligence Research Field(s) : Applied Econometrics , Labour Economics , Urban and Regional Economics
